title: Sterling-Hollis Storefront Health
description: Sample dashboard for Sterling-Hollis storefront real-user health, AI workflows, backend behavior, LLM usage, logs, and network path. Modeled after the Shopist Chat dashboard, but scoped to Sterling-Hollis services and the retail/chat/style-finder journey.

definition.title: Backend API Latency from APM Metrics

definition.content: Network Path widgets assume tests exist for sterling-hollis.quickstark.com, sterling-hollis-be.quickstark.com, OpenAI, and Pinecone. If topology is empty, create or attach the relevant Network Path test IDs.
